extracted_json.title: A note on Complementors

blocks.text: A sixth set of players was added to Porter's Positioning (aka Competitive Strategy) framework: "Complementors", which gives rise to a sixth force: "power to influence".
Pharmaceutical companies (e.g., Pfizer, ....) are competitors in the "medical drug delivery industry".

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Complementors as a sixth force added to Porter's competitive strategy framework
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes introduce "Complementors" as a sixth set of players added to Porter's Positioning (Competitive Strategy) framework, giving rise to a sixth force: "power to influence." A health-care example illustrates this: pharmaceutical companies (e.g., Pfizer) compete in the medical drug delivery industry, while doctors act as complementors.
